headline: Is Tapestry, Inc. (TPR) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is TPR a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Tapestry, Inc. on X.com by @MoneyShow. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on TPR. Tapestry, Inc.’s share was trading at $150.53 as of June 23rd. TPR’s trailing and forward P/E were 45.89 and 19.80 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. Tapestry […]
